    Turn words into apps

    Turning your CRM ideas into a real app using natural language. No code, No limits.

    Launch in seconds

    Your CRM app is hosted and ready to go live the moment it's built. Share it instantly or connect your own domain.

    Backend built-in

    We handle the heavy lifting—auth, databases, and storage are included. Your CRM apps won't just look good; they'll have the backend power to run your operations at scale.

    A safe space for your ideas to grow.

    SSO for secure access

    Seamlessly onboard entire departments securely through your existing identity provider.

    Private deployments to protect innovations

    Test and share prototypes in a secure space. Keep your work safe and visible only to the people you trust — until it’s ready for launch.

    Built-in security check

    Base44's integrated Security Scanner serves as your first line of defense, identifying common vulnerabilities from the start.

    Smart access controls

    Map your team structure, assign roles, and manage invites through SCIM. Decide who can view, edit, or deploy — all in a secure, streamlined way.

    Seamless integrations for your app ecosystem

    Integrate your favorite tools with base44 to enhance your CRM workflows. Streamline customer management with automated processes.

    Sync and manage your contacts, deals, and marketing workflows seamlessly.

    Add Request

    Trusted by 2M+ users

    Frequently asked questions

    How secure is my CRM app?

    Your CRM app's security is a top priority at Base44. We support multiple auth providers, scan for exposed secrets and unsafe backend functions, and store your data securely.

    Can I customize my CRM app after it's created?

    Definitely! With Base44, you can refine your CRM app via AI chat or Visual Edit, adjusting pages, workflows, and design elements.

    Which integrations can I add to my CRM apps?

    You can connect a wide range of external tools to your CRM apps via the catalog or AI chat. API keys are securely stored. Note, this requires a Builder or higher plan.

    Can I build CRM apps without coding experience?

    Absolutely! Base44 is designed for everyone, not just developers. You can build full-stack CRM apps using plain-language prompts, no coding required.

    Can I build CRM apps for free?

    Yes, you can! Base44 enables you to build and deploy CRM apps for free. For additional features like custom domains and integrations, a Builder or higher plan is needed.

    How do I build CRM apps with AI?

    With Base44, building CRM apps with AI is easy! Just use plain-language prompts to guide the AI in creating your full-stack app.

    So, what are we building?

    Get started

    Base44 is the AI-powered platform that lets users build fully functioning apps in minutes. Using nothing but natural language, Base44 enables anyone to turn their words into productivity apps, back-office tools, customer portals, or complete enterprise products that are ready to use—no integrations required.
